---
name: Safety or vulnerability report
about: Learn how to report sensitive security issues privately
title: "[Security]: "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

Do not file public issues for suspected vulnerabilities, credential exposure, unsafe automation bypasses, or exploit details.

Please follow `SECURITY.md` and contact the maintainers privately. Include only the information needed to understand the issue, and do not share live secrets, private keys, tokens, `.env` contents, production data, or sensitive logs in public.
